metaDesc: ICL Maestro - Customized lens implantation by a 20-year ICL specialist
heroTitle: Based on big data from over 15,000 ICL surgeries
heroBottomText: ICL Reference Doctor, LEE DONG HOON, with 22 years of experience exclusively in ICL lens implantation.
selectionH3: 's personalized system with over 15,000 surgical experiences
selectionText: If you are considering ICL lens implantation, here are some important factors to keep in mind.
selectionItem1Des: It is crucial to accurately measure the ocular space to select the right lens size. Therefore, you should ensure that there is equipment for 3D ocular space measurement without errors.
selectionItem2Des: Using a small lens can scratch the crystalline lens, leading to cataracts, while using a large lens can push up the iris, causing glaucoma. Therefore, special expertise from a surgeon is required to determine the precise lens size without errors.
selectionItem3Des: Even a 1-degree error in the astigmatism axis can lead to incomplete astigmatism correction, resulting in dizziness and residual astigmatism. Hence, skilled surgical techniques for precise lens positioning are critical.
selectionItem4Title: The skill and expertise of the medical staff
selectionItem4Des: Lens implantation is a surgical procedure, so the outcomes depend on the skills of the medical personnel. Dr. LEE DONG HOON is one of only seven EVO+ ICL reference doctors in Korea.
diagnosisText: A solution that completes DR.ICL Eye Clinic's MAESTRO surgical technique
equip1Des: One of the few corneal tomography devices in Korea that enables accurate ocular space measurement without errors.
equip2Des: FDA standard! A measurement ranges more than twice that of existing equipment, allowing for more accurate evaluation of endothelial cells.
equip3Nm: Enables precise vision measurement even for extreme myopia
equip3NmHtml: Enables precise vision measurement even for extreme myopia
equip3Des: Extreme myopia, corneal ectasia, and Avelino conditions require precise testing equipment, as standard vision examinations cannot yield accurate results.
fastFactsText1: A specialized clinic for lens implantation, proven by 22 years of clinical research,
fastFactsText2: focusing solely on lens implantation— this is what sets DR. ICL Eye Clinic apart.
surgeryTimeDes:

This minimizes damage caused by the surgery.

doctorResearch2: Developed an "Equation for Ocular Space Measurement and Optimal Lens Selection" to Prevent ICL Side Effects
